skills.name: Technical SEO Auditor
skills.description: Audit robots, sitemap, canonical, metadata, schema, hreflang, 404s, page structure, and Core Web Vitals readiness.
primaryUseCases: Diagnose traffic drops or missing organic traffic
Turn technical SEO evidence into Codex implementation tasks
Prepare seo_evidence drafts from EBOS health and readiness data

skills.name: GEO Visibility Auditor
skills.description: Plan visibility checks for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Bing Copilot, Kimi, Doubao, and other answer engines.
primaryUseCases: Investigate AI search visibility gaps
Plan AI search probe setup
Draft GEO content actions from weekly report evidence

skills.name: Growth Product Manager
skills.description: Use Weekly and Monthly Review evidence to set product priorities and revenue validation plans.
primaryUseCases: Prioritize product development after weekly or monthly review
Define revenue validation experiments
Draft the next product PRD

skills.name: Digital Product Researcher
skills.description: Research AI digital product opportunities such as agents, video tools, voice tools, SEO tools, templates, prompt kits, and workflow packs.
primaryUseCases: Find AI digital product opportunities
Score product candidates
Translate market signals into product bets

skills.name: Competitor Watch Analyst
skills.description: Analyze competitor site structure, products, pricing, SEO pages, content strategy, and traffic entry points.
primaryUseCases: Compare ENHE against direct or adjacent competitors
Draft competitor evidence
Extract positioning and differentiation actions

skills.name: Landing Page Conversion Auditor
skills.description: Audit product page conversion through headline, subheadline, CTA, FAQ, pricing, purchase path, trust elements, demo video, and schema.
primaryUseCases: Diagnose poor conversion or no revenue
Create landing page improvement tasks
Turn product page evidence into A/B test ideas

skills.name: Weekly Business Reviewer
skills.description: Read weekly_report evidence and turn the weekly business state into explicit execution tasks.
primaryUseCases: Clarify next-week execution
Split weekly risks into actionable tasks
Prioritize tasks from current weekly evidence

skills.name: Monthly Strategy Reviewer
skills.description: Read monthly_review evidence and generate next-month strategic priorities, stop/keep/start decisions, and OKRs.
primaryUseCases: Create monthly strategy plans
Translate monthly review evidence into OKRs
Decide what to stop, keep, or start next month

skills.name: AI Digital Product Launcher
skills.description: Turn an AI product idea into a launch package with product page copy, FAQ, SEO/GEO labels, marketplace copy, and cover image requirements.
primaryUseCases: Prepare a new AI digital product for listing
Draft product page and marketplace copy
Create Codex tasks for launch assets and pages

skills.name: EBOS Evidence Analyst
skills.description: Read the Evidence Catalog and decide which evidence is missing and which data gaps most affect business judgment.
primaryUseCases: Assess current EBOS evidence gaps
Prioritize data source setup
Create the next evidence task list
